chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1769 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of petition 13.05.2025 Sardar Muhammad Ishaque, advocate for the petitioner On the last date following order was passed: “2,4&5. Learned counsel is put on notice to satisfy this court as to how jurisdiction can be entertained in a case where merely a show cause notice has been issued. To come up on 13.05.2025” Today learned counsel remains to satisfy as to maintainability. Prima facie pursuant to show cause notice opportunity of hearing was provided to the petitioner. The date was 24.04.2025 and today is 13.05.2025. Once the forum, opportunity of hearing has already been provided in the statutory hierarchy no case is made out to seek direct recourse in writ jurisdiction. Petition found to be misconceived is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Amjad
